_what: J's ENTRY-QUALITY analysis — reconstruct entry reads + GOOD vs BAD-thesis discriminators

_honesty.behaviour: EXACT — his real entry/exit fills, qty, P&L
_honesty.entry_read: INFERRED — reconstructed look-ahead-free from SPY 5m tape (no notes)
_honesty.thesis_label: EXACT direction — SPY underlying continued his way after entry (SPX/SPY ~10:1)
_honesty.premium_MAE: ESTIMATE — BS, IV implied from his own entry fill (labelled _est)

entry_mae_prem_frac_est._note: ESTIMATE (BS, IV implied from entry fill); only solvable subset

timing_poke_finding._question: Does entering before a confirming close cause a bigger poke?

right_thesis_only._note: GOOD-thesis trades only — bigger poke here = harder to hold a correct read
